summary: Closed, unmerged WIP branch for pending decomp matches across fighter, ground/stage, item, audio, and menu code. The PR body reported 0 matched and 5 failed target attempts, but the decomp-dev bot comment for GALE01 reported +0.06% matched code (+2200 bytes), 13 new 100% matches, and 18 additional unmatched-item improvements. Treat this as a useful prototype/matching evidence slice rather than landed project history.

key_files.role: Implemented four near-identical Home Run callbacks grHomeRun_8021DF50, grHomeRun_8021E0D4, grHomeRun_8021E258, and grHomeRun_8021E3DC; added grHr_804D6AE4.
Added grHomeRun_GroundVars and inserted it into Ground.gv union.
Implemented grCorneria_801E0D30, grCorneria_801E0F6C, and grCorneria_801E2D90, all reported by bot as new matches.
Implemented ft_800C0098 under local pragma fences disabling auto_inline and global_optimizer.
Implemented lbAudioAx_80024DC4 and updated object allocator calls to address lbl_80433710.alloc.
Replaced plain HSD_ObjAllocData lbl_80433710 with lbAudioAx_PoolAlloc containing alloc, x2C, and x70 arrays.
Implemented it_2725_Logic101_Destroyed and it_2725_Logic101_ShieldBounced; added Mewtwo/Kirby special-N and vector/refract includes.
Changed itMewtwoShadowball_ItemVars x2C from float array storage to HSD_GObj* plus x30[5], exposing owner/object linkage.
Added implementations for it_802EF098, it_802EF320, and Logic22 Clanked/HitShield/Absorbed callbacks, reported as high-percent unmatched improvements.
Changed ftCrazyHandAttributes x24 from s32 to float, matching its use in ftCh_Init_80157170.
Implemented mnName_8023749C under opt_common_subs-off pragma; bot reported 97.84% improvement.
Split static data from int to two s16 fields and used an inline random range helper for grOldKongo_8021005C.

what_changed: Replaced many placeholder markers such as /// #function with C implementations across 23 changed files.

Bot-reported 100% new matches included grCorneria_801E0F6C, grCorneria_801E2D90, grCorneria_801E0D30, grHomeRun_8021DF50, grHomeRun_8021E0D4, grHomeRun_8021E258, grHomeRun_8021E3DC, fn_800DC070, ft_800C0098, it_2725_Logic101_Destroyed, ftCh_Init_80157170, lbAudioAx_80024DC4, and grOldPupupu_80210C7C.

Stage/ground work covered Corneria Arwing/platform logic, Great Bay vertex updates from JObj positions, Home Run Contest text positioning, Inishie block callback logic, and Old Kongo/Old Pupupu random timer/state initialization.
Fighter work covered ftCo capture-jump setup, Crazy Hand damage-state setup, Kirby Mewtwo hat material color writes, and fighter color-animation state reset/application.
Item work covered Klap random angular values, Mewtwo Shadow Ball destroy and shield-bounce behavior, and tools item motion/collision event transitions.
Menu/audio/library work covered mnName_8023749C language-dependent string lookup and lbAudioAx pool allocation layout/function behavior.
Header and type changes replaced several UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS prototypes with typed signatures, including grGreatBay_801F660C, grHomeRun_8021EC58, it_802EF098, and mnName_8023749C.
The PR remained closed without merge; its own generated progress text listed failed pending targets grOnett_801E5194, fn_80170110, grPura_80212FC0, IsNameUnique, and pl_80038628.
smart_moves: Used struct-layout corrections to make code type-check and match better: ftCrazyHandAttributes.x24 became float, Mewtwo Shadow Ball x2C became HSD_GObj*, lbAudioAx allocator storage became a real pool struct, and Old Kongo/Old Pupupu data became paired s16 fields.
Kept compiler workaround pragmas narrow and local: ft_800C0098 is wrapped with auto_inline/global_optimizer disabled, and mnName_8023749C is wrapped with opt_common_subs disabled.
Preserved repeated emitted-code shapes instead of refactoring them away, especially the four Home Run text-position callbacks and the repeated tools item state-transition blocks.
Updated headers alongside C implementations so known signatures propagated instead of leaving UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS placeholders.
Matched allocation structure by naming the embedded HSD_ObjAllocData member alloc and updating HSD_ObjAlloc, HSD_ObjFree, and HSD_ObjAllocInit call sites to pass &lbl_80433710.alloc.

Used exact-looking matching idioms where needed, including assignment inside Fighter_ChangeMotionState arguments, pointer punning for HSD_Material diffuse color, explicit casts on union fields, and exact assert text/line evidence.
decomp_lessons: Before forcing control-flow changes, verify data layout: several gains came from correcting field types and embedded structs rather than from large algorithm rewrites.
Ground.gv union members can benefit from stage-specific structs, but matching may still require careful overlay access through existing unk fields and explicit casts.
For small item event callbacks, duplicate the original state-transition sequence if the binary emits duplicate code; helper extraction may be cleaner but can break matching.
Compiler pragmas are useful matching tools, but this PR shows them best as function-local fences rather than broad file-level settings.

When a value is used as a pointer in behavior code, update the owning item-vars struct accordingly; the Mewtwo Shadow Ball x2C change made destroy cleanup call ftMt_SpecialN_SetNULL or ftKb_SpecialNMt_80107040 on an HSD_GObj*.
High-percent improvements listed by the bot are not the same as landed matches, especially for a closed/unmerged WIP PR; future work should search for later merged equivalents before reusing code.
naming_conventions: Stage globals used subsystem abbreviations plus address-style names, such as grHr_804D6AE4 and grGb_803E4048.
Unknown or not-yet-semantic functions kept address-suffixed names such as fn_800DC070, ft_800C0098, it_802EF098, and mnName_8023749C.
Stage-specific ground variable structs follow gr<Stage>_GroundVars style, shown by grHomeRun_GroundVars.
Headers retained address comments while replacing unknown prototypes with concrete signatures when evidence existed.
Unknown struct fields stayed offset-based, such as xC4, xC6, xC8, xCC, x2C, and x30, avoiding unsupported semantic renames.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Used #pragma auto_inline off and #pragma global_optimizer off for ft_800C0098.
Used repeated Ground_801C0498 calls and literal 0.0F/-1.0F expressions in Home Run callbacks rather than simplifying them.
Used PAD_STACK(16) in fn_801FBF6C and exact __assert("grinishie1.c", 0x425, "new_gobj") evidence.
Used HSD_ASSERT(1398, jobj) in grGreatBay_801F660C before lb_8000B1CC and mpVtxSetPos.
Used s16 field splitting and HSD_Randi range logic for Old Kongo and Old Pupupu random initialization.
Used sentinel compare against 0x83D60U in lbAudioAx_80024DC4 pool slot search.
Used pointer punning *(u32*) &mat->diffuse = *arg1 in Kirby hat material color code.
Used lbVector_Mirror, atan2f, and M_TAU normalization loops for Mewtwo Shadow Ball shield bounce.
review_feedback: No human reviews or review comments are present in the slice.
decomp-dev bot reported GALE01 matched code at 58.65% with +0.06% and +2200 bytes.
decomp-dev bot reported 13 new matches and 18 improvements in unmatched items.
The PR body reported 0 matched and 5 failed pending targets: grOnett_801E5194 at 78.1%, fn_80170110 no match, grPura_80212FC0 at 96.4%, IsNameUnique at 97.1%, and pl_80038628 at 55.6%.
The PR was closed without merge, so there is no acceptance signal for these implementations in this slice.
